basics.description: Foundation deployment for the MDC CWPP workshop: enables all 13 Defender for Cloud CWPP plans, creates a Log Analytics workspace, onboards Sentinel, and wires the MDC connector.

basics.name: envTag
basics.label: Env tag (2 letters)
basics.toolTip: Used as a short suffix in resource names (e.g. 'pc' → law-mdc-pc-xxxx)
